title: What happens at school - Ministry of Education
content:
Ngā mahi o roto i te rāngai kura

## What happens at school
Information about how schools and programmes are run, and how you can be involved.
- Learning and curriculum 1
- Hōtaka whakawhiti kura School exchange programmes Find out how secondary school exchange programmes work in New Zealand.
Find out how secondary school exchange programmes work in New Zealand.
- Ngā mahi a te poari ā-kura The role of the school board Learn what the school board is, who is on it and how you can be involved with it.
Learn what the school board is, who is on it and how you can be involved with it.
